generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor in the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for simulated and derived data in the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MeasuredTorqueDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted, SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted, SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MeasuredTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedDataSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedDataSensor
]

instance SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedDataSensor
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedDataSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance MotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SecondaryPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Secondary position data from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT, MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current and motor parameters for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position sensors for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulatedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values from friction models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity values from friction models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural description of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural description of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell model for data linking of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousJointFrictionIdentification
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousJointFrictionIdentification, MotionAccuracyEnhancement
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming of sensor data from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard, ContinuousJointFrictionIdentification, MotionAccuracyEnhancement
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for controlling the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancement
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsights
]

instance ContinuousJointFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsights
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model updates for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateRobotControlAlgorithms
]

instance FrictionParameterInsights : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameter insights used to update robot control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy during machining operations"
]

instance UpdateRobotControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update robot control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy during machining operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driven by current input for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component controlled via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox components controlled via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining applications with a maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and speed limit of 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements streamed via MQTT, enabling continuous model refinement during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), MQTT data streaming, SysML/Simulink models, AAS for asset description, and unified dashboard for data visualization and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, utilizing live operational data for continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data to identify friction deviations, using white-box and black-box models for multi-physics-aware friction identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data linkage."
]
